$description: Content tokens. Keys are semantic, never descriptive. See /skills/copy.md.

home.headline: Design in code. Ship from day one.
home.body: This starter follows the playbook: codebase is the design system, skill files persist context, and designers ship via PRs. Open the design system to see live tokens, the canvas for a multi-flow overview, or the prototype to step through a flow.

errors.auth.expired: Your session expired. Sign in to continue.
errors.network.unreachable: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
